evidence_direction_note: MECH-094 removed from claim_ids (2026-03-25). C5 (residue_harm_coverage) tests ResidueField accumulation at harm sites but does NOT test MECH-094's hypothesis-tag write gate. hypothesis_tag was hardcoded False throughout -- tag was never varied, never compared tag-on vs tag-off. Residue accumulating during committed (tag=False) episodes is residue-field mechanics (MECH-056/ARC-018 territory), not write-gate isolation. A targeted experiment toggling hypothesis_tag is required for MECH-094 evidence.
